slides.title: Protect the eyes that *carry you* through life.
slides.sub: Vision ages quietly alongside the rest of you. A few simple habits help you see well for longer.

slides.title: Your eyes age too
slides.body: Like muscle and skin, vision changes with the years. Treating your eyes with the same care *pays off* over a lifetime.

slides.title: Try the 20-20-20 habit
slides.body: Every 20 minutes, look 20 feet away for 20 seconds. This small reset *may help* ease tired, dry eyes from long screens.

slides.title: Shield your eyes from UV
slides.body: Bright sun reaches your eyes too. Quality sunglasses can support healthier eyes and may help slow some age related changes.

slides.title: Greens and fish help
slides.body: Leafy greens and oily fish carry nutrients linked to eye health. A colorful plate *quietly supports* your vision over time.

slides.title: Get your eyes checked
slides.body: Regular exams catch changes early, often before you notice them. A simple visit is one of the kindest things you can do.

slides.title: Care for the eyes you *rely on*.
slides.body: Vibe Health helps you build the daily habits, from food to rest, that support your whole body, all in one simple score.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Your eyes age right along with the rest of you, and they're easy to take for granted. 🌿

The 20-20-20 break, good sunglasses, leafy greens and oily fish, and a regular check-up all help you see well for longer. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns small daily habits into one clear score → link in bio.
youtube_title: How to Protect Your Vision as You Age
